name: --skip-fresh flag bypasses the gate and logs an audit entry per the live-freshness contract
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch compliance && printf '2026-04-01T00:00:00Z
' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch/cfpb.txt && printf 'rule_id: r1
provenance:
  - {class: pr-corpus, source_id: cfpb}
' > rule.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/freshness-gate.sh" --rule rule.yaml --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h --skip-fresh --audit-log compliance/audit.log 2>out.txt && grep -q 'gate=bypassed' out.txt && grep -q '"event":"skip-fresh-bypass"' compliance/audit.log && echo ok 1>&2
